user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed car panel and bumper are visible from an angle where surface deformation can be clearly assessed.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows extensive denting and damage to the rear bumper and the body panel above it, consistent with the claim.

user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.

Customer: I am opening a claim for my windshield. | Support: What happened? | Customer: A small stone hit it while I was driving and now there is a crack spreading from that spot. | Support: Is the car otherwise okay? | Customer: Yes, this is only about the front glass. I added the pictures I have.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed glass (windshield) is visible clearly enough in img_1 to inspect cracks and breakage, meeting REQ_CAR_GLASS_LIGHT_MIRROR.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows the car's windshield with extensive spider-web cracking and shattering, which supports the claim of a crack on the windshield. Image img_2 shows an intact windshield, but img_1 provides clear evidence of the damage.

user_claim: Customer: Someone clipped my car while it was parked. | Support: What part was hit? | Customer: The side mirror got damaged. It is not sitting the way it should anymore. | Support: Was there any damage to the door too? | Customer: I did not notice anything else major, just the mirror.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed side mirror is clearly visible, allowing for inspection of cracks and breakage, meeting REQ_CAR_GLASS_LIGHT_MIRROR.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows the side mirror with extensive glass shattering, supporting the claim that the side mirror is damaged.

user_claim: Customer: I want to file this as bumper damage. | Support: Can you tell me what happened? | Customer: The car was tapped from behind and now the back looks damaged. | Support: Are you asking for review of the rear side? | Customer: Yes, the back bumper. It looks pretty bad to me, so I uploaded both photos.

Customer: Hi, I am not fully sure how to explain this because I noticed it only after reaching home. | Support: No problem, please tell me what happened. | Customer: There was a small bump earlier, nothing major, and I first thought everything was fine. Later I looked at the car again because my family member said the front area looked different. | Support: Are you reporting a general vehicle issue or a specific damaged part? | Customer: I was confused at first because I checked the side and the front and walked around the car a few times. I do not want to claim the wrong thing. | Support: That is okay. What part do you want reviewed? | Customer: After checking again, I think the issue is with the headlight. It looks like the headlight may be cracked, so please review that part.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed light (headlight) is not visible clearly enough in the image to inspect for cracks, breakage, or missing parts.
claim_status_justification: The provided image (img_1) shows the side and rear portion of the car, facing away from the camera. The front of the car, where the headlight is located, is not visible at all, making it impossible to assess the claim of a cracked headlight.

user_claim: Customer: There is a dent along the side of my car. | Support: When did you notice it? | Customer: This morning, after the car had been parked near the gate. | Support: Is it near the front or back? | Customer: It is on the door panel area. I attached two photos from different distances.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed car panel (door) is visible from an angle where surface marks and deformation can be assessed in image 2.
claim_status_justification: Image 2 clearly shows a significant dent and associated scratches on the rear door panel of the vehicle, consistent with the customer's claim of a dent on the door panel area.

user_claim: Customer: I picked up my car after service and noticed a mark on the hood. | Support: What kind of mark is it? | Customer: It looks like a scratch across the top panel. | Support: Do you think it happened during service? | Customer: Yes, that is why I am asking for review. The photo is attached.

Customer: My laptop fell from the table yesterday. | Support: Is it turning on? | Customer: It turns on, but the display glass has a crack now. | Support: Are you reporting the screen only or the whole laptop? | Customer: The screen is the issue. I attached a photo of it open.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed laptop screen area is visible clearly enough in image img_1 to inspect the claimed crack.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows the laptop screen with extensive glass shattering, including a central impact point and radiating cracks, which supports the claim of a cracked display.

user_claim: Customer: I am not sure if this should be a repair claim or a replacement claim, so I wanted to ask first. | Support: We can help. What device is this about? | Customer: It is my laptop. I carry it every day, and yesterday my bag got pressed between two seats during travel. At first I thought the laptop was okay because it still opened. | Support: What changed after that? | Customer: Later, while using it, I noticed marks on the display area. I restarted it twice because I thought it might just be something on the screen, but it still bothered me. | Support: Are you reporting keyboard, hinge, body, or screen damage? | Customer: Not the keyboard or hinge. The issue I want checked is the screen. It looks shattered to me, so I am submitting this as screen damage.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed laptop screen area is visible clearly enough in img_1 to inspect the claimed damage.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows the laptop screen with a significant impact point and radiating cracks, consistent with a shattered display.

user_claim: Customer: The laptop trackpad has stopped working properly. | Support: Did anything happen before it stopped working? | Customer: The front area hit the desk edge when I moved it. | Support: Are you reporting internal function or physical damage? | Customer: Physical damage around the trackpad area. I attached the photo for review.

Customer: My delivery box arrived damaged. | Support: What part of the package was affected? | Customer: One corner was crushed in when I received it. | Support: Is the item inside part of this claim? | Customer: Not right now. I am reporting the package corner damage.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The package exterior and the claimed corner are visible clearly enough in img_1 to inspect the packaging damage.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows a significant crush and deformation on one corner of the package, consistent with the claim.

user_claim: Customer: Package receive hua toh opened jaisa lag raha tha. | Support: Tape broken tha ya box crush hua tha? | Customer: Seal wali side phati hui thi, jaise parcel khola gaya ho. | Support: Kya andar ka item missing hai? | Customer: Abhi item missing claim nahi kar raha, sirf torn packaging review karwana hai.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Image 1 clearly shows the package exterior and the torn seal/tape on the side, meeting REQ_PACKAGE_EXTERIOR.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 clearly shows significant tearing and damage to the tape/seal on one side of the package, consistent with the claim of torn packaging on the seal side.

user_claim: Customer: I received a package that looks water damaged. | Support: Was the item inside wet too? | Customer: I have not opened everything yet, but the outside has a wet-looking stain. | Support: So the claim is about the package condition? | Customer: Yes, the package surface looked damaged when it arrived.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The affected package surface is visible clearly enough to assess the stain and water damage, satisfying REQ_PACKAGE_LABEL_OR_STAIN.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows a prominent dark, wet-looking stain running down the side and corner of the cardboard package, consistent with water damage. The cardboard also appears softened and slightly compromised in the affected area.

user_claim: Customer: The item I ordered was not inside the box. | Support: Did the package look opened when you received it? | Customer: I checked it after delivery and could not find the product inside. | Support: What are you asking us to verify? | Customer: Please verify that the contents are missing from the package.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The opened package and relevant contents area are visible clearly enough in img_1 to assess missing items, satisfying REQ_PACKAGE_CONTENTS.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows the opened package filled entirely with crumpled packing material, with no actual product visible inside, which supports the claim that the contents are missing.

user_claim: Customer: The shipping box arrived in bad condition. | Support: What kind of condition issue are you reporting? | Customer: It looked badly crushed when it was delivered. | Support: Is the claim about the outside box or the product inside? | Customer: The outside box. I want the crushed box reviewed.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image provided shows a can with a dent, not the claimed shipping box exterior. Therefore, the minimum evidence for inspecting packaging damage on the package exterior is not met.
claim_status_justification: The user claims the shipping box was crushed, but image img_1 displays a dented can, which is an item and not the claimed shipping box. The claimed object is not visible.

user_claim: Customer: My delivery box arrived opened. | Support: Was the package crushed or was the seal affected? | Customer: The seal area looked torn when I received it. | Support: Are you asking us to review the package condition or the item inside? | Customer: The package condition. I want the torn-open package reviewed.
